response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal project management — key requirements for this executive-level role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across languages, platforms, and DevOps infrastructure
Strong track record of mentoring, teaching, and organizing technical workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project management experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, requirements management, or compliance/security governance
